case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SOTERO VARGAS MORALES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,921.64 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. ) AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, SOTERO VARGAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED JUL-25-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, SOTERO VARGAS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. )

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-16-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (JESSE A. OCHOA) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. )

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED BY JESSE A. OCHOA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE FOR M. MANZELLA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. ) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, SOTERO VARGAS $911.64 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $956.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
